title: Our Hearts Were Young and Gay
writer: Sheridan Gibney, Cornelia Otis Skinner, Emily Kimbrough
actors: Gail Russell, Diana Lynn, Charles Ruggles
plot: In 1923, two young ladies depart unescorted for a tour of Europe and meet two eligible men aboard the ship. Their great naivete' and efforts to seem grown-up lead them into many comic misadventures.
